name: livepilot
description: Agentic production system for Ableton Live 12. Make beats, mix tracks, design sounds, and arrange songs with 393 AI-powered tools.
long_description:
LivePilot is an agentic production system for Ableton Live 12. 397 tools across 51 domains — device atlas (1305 devices), sample intelligence (Splice + browser + filesystem), auto-composition, spectral perception, technique memory, and 12 creative engines.

**What it does:**
- Creates MIDI clips with notes, chords, and rhythms
- Loads instruments and effects via Device Atlas (1305 devices indexed)
- Searches samples across Splice, Ableton browser, and filesystem
- Plans compositions from text prompts with genre-aware layering
- Slices samples with intent-based MIDI generation
- Mixes with volume, panning, sends, and automation
- Analyzes your mix with real-time spectral data (M4L bridge)
- Diagnoses stuck sessions and generates creative rescue variants
- Remembers your production style across sessions

**How it works:**
LivePilot installs a Remote Script in Ableton that communicates with the AI over a local TCP connection. Everything runs on your machine — no audio leaves your computer.

auto_install_remote_script.title: Auto-install Remote Script
auto_install_remote_script.description: Automatically install the LivePilot Remote Script into Ableton Live's Remote Scripts folder on first launch. You'll still need to select 'LivePilot' in Ableton's Preferences > Link, Tempo & MIDI > Control Surface.

ableton_port.title: Ableton TCP Port
ableton_port.description: TCP port for communication with Ableton Live. Only change this if you have a port conflict. Default: 9878.

tools.name: get_session_info
tools.description: Get comprehensive session state: tempo, tracks, scenes, transport

tools.name: create_midi_track
tools.description: Create a new MIDI track with optional name and color

tools.name: add_notes
tools.description: Add MIDI notes to a clip with pitch, timing, velocity, probability

tools.name: search_browser
tools.description: Search Ableton's browser for instruments, effects, drums, samples

tools.name: find_and_load_device
tools.description: Find a device by name and load it onto a track

tools.name: set_device_parameter
tools.description: Set any device parameter by name with value verification

tools.name: fire_scene
tools.description: Launch a scene, triggering all its clips

tools.name: analyze_harmony
tools.description: Analyze chord progression with Roman numeral analysis

tools.name: get_master_spectrum
tools.description: Real-time 8-band frequency analysis of the master bus

tools.name: memory_learn
tools.description: Save a production technique for future recall

tools.name: plan_arrangement
tools.description: Generate a full arrangement blueprint with sections and transitions
